title: Introduce typed Captain envelope model
goal: Replace ad-hoc Captain action dictionaries with a typed internal model or dataclass-style validation layer while preserving the public JSON envelope and without changing execution authority.

acceptance.assertion: Captain action envelope validation is represented by typed internal objects rather than ad-hoc mutated dictionaries.
The public captain-preflight JSON input and output contract remains compatible or has an explicit schema-version migration.
The typed model refactor does not add merge, deploy, restart, fleet mutation, cleanup or secret authority.

metadata.reason: PR #97 intentionally avoids large refactor; review identified growing dictionary mutation complexity in _captain_actions.
